library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed. The resolved 2.0.0 artifact already brings its required compile/runtime dependencies; the javac failure is from Maven SCM 2.0.0 API changes, not missing setup.
risks: Meaningful tests that execute real Git commands depend on a git executable being available on PATH; ubuntu-latest normally provides this, so it is not a Forge deterministic setup item.

Existing 1.11.1 tests use removed/changed 2.0.0 APIs such as org.apache.maven.scm.log.DefaultLog and static GitRemoteInfoCommand.createCommandLine; generated tests must target the 2.0.0 API rather than add old Maven SCM artifacts.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8307 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
